title: Review reactivity correctness
description: Read a component and report mutations the compiler cannot track and effects that risk loops.
body: Use when asked why a component is stale or looping. Actions: inspect each state change for in-place mutation vs assignment, check whether the file is legacy or runes mode and apply the right rule, and trace every $effect to confirm it does not write its own dependencies. Do not assume a value updates just because it was mutated. Report and record each untracked mutation, missing reactive declaration, and self-triggering effect with its file and line. This skill is read-only and must not refactor state without runtime permission. Validation signals include identifying the exact mutation site that fails to re-render. Risk boundary: flag a $effect feeding its own input as an infinite-loop risk and recommend converting it to $derived.
